scripts.build:html: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('coordinator/web/dist', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('coordinator/web/src/index.html', 'coordinator/web/dist/index.html')"
scripts.build:js: javascript-obfuscator coordinator/web/src/app.js --output coordinator/web/dist/app.js --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
